user_prompt: Among Thrillers in the catalog with runtime >= 90 minutes, which 3 titles have the highest rating-per-minute ratio? Show title, runtime, rating, and the ratio (rating divided by runtime, in 5-decimal precision) for each.
expected_outcome: Lists exactly 3 thriller titles with runtime >= 90 min, sorted by rating/runtime descending, with the ratio computed precisely. Reasoning textually about ratios across many candidates is unreliable; agents with run_python should win this consistently.
